---
title: "Magnum Bonum, or, Mother Carey’s Brood. 3 vols."
---

## Magnum Bonum, or, Mother Carey’s Brood. 3 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1879
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
